gracefulShutdown.title: Graceful Shutdown
gracefulShutdown.subtitle: Configure how the platform drains active connections and outbox messages on shutdown.
gracefulShutdown.error: Failed to load graceful shutdown configuration.
gracefulShutdown.requestDrainHint: Maximum time to wait for in-flight HTTP requests to complete before shutting down (seconds).
gracefulShutdown.outboxDrainHint: Maximum time to wait for pending outbox events to be published before shutting down (seconds).
gracefulShutdown.healthCheck503Hint: Health endpoint returns 503 immediately on shutdown signal so load balancers route traffic away.
gracefulShutdown.auditShutdownHint: Record a security event in the audit trail every time the platform shuts down or starts up.
gracefulShutdown.infoMsg: These settings control how the platform handles in-flight requests when a shutdown signal (SIGTERM) is received. Correct configuration prevents request loss during rolling deployments.
gracefulShutdown.step1: Receive SIGTERM — stop accepting new connections
gracefulShutdown.step2: Health check returns 503 (if configured) — load balancer stops routing
gracefulShutdown.step3: Wait for in-flight requests to complete (request drain timeout)
gracefulShutdown.step4: Drain outbox messages to message bus (outbox drain timeout)
